zh.lifeSummary: William Judsonne是Robert Judsonne和Eufemia Thorpe的兒子，於1578年2月27日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可。他與Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1637年在英國越可爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Judsonne是Robert Judsonne和Eufemia Thorpe的儿子，于1578年2月27日出生在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可。他与Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1637年在英国越可爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: William Judsonne was born on 27 February 1578, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert Judsonne and Eufemia Thorpe. He married Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1637, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: William Judsonne est né le 27 février 1578, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert Judsonne et Eufemia Thorpe. Il a épousé Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1637, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Judsonne wurde am 27. Februar 1578 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Robert Judsonne und Eufemia Thorpe geboren. Er hat in England, United Kingdom Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1637 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: William Judsonne è nato il il 27 febbraio 1578 nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Robert Judsonne e Eufemia Thorpe. Lui sposato Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1637, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Judsonneは1578年2月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでRobert JudsonneとEufemia Thorpeの息子として生まれた。イギリスイギリスでWilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Judsonne(은)는 1578년 2월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Robert Judsonne(와)과 Eufemia Thorpe의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1637년 영국 요르크실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Judsonne nasceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1578, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Robert Judsonne e Eufemia Thorpe. Ele casou-se com Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1637, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Judsonne родился 27 февраля 1578 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Robert Judsonne и Eufemia Thorpe. Он женился на женщине по имени Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1637 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Judsonne nació el 27 de febrero de 1578, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Robert Judsonne y Eufemia Thorpe. Se casó con Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1637, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
